summary: Tested Auto-Sync Calendar V1 feature. All backend APIs (13/13 tests) and frontend UI components working correctly. Auto-sync settings endpoints, sync_source field in sync logs, Zap icon for auto-synced appointments, and provider selector on Integrations page all verified.
passed_tests: 1. GET /api/calendar/auto-sync/settings - Returns auto_sync_enabled + auto_sync_provider (PASSED)
2. PUT /api/calendar/auto-sync/settings - Enable with valid connected provider (PASSED)
3. PUT /api/calendar/auto-sync/settings - Disable auto-sync (PASSED)
4. PUT /api/calendar/auto-sync/settings - Refuse enabled=true without provider (400) (PASSED)
5. PUT /api/calendar/auto-sync/settings - Refuse invalid provider (400) (PASSED)
6. PUT /api/calendar/auto-sync/settings - Refuse if provider not connected (400) (PASSED)
7. GET /api/calendar/sync/status/{id} - Returns sync_source in response (PASSED)
8. POST /api/appointments/ - Auto-sync triggered on creation when enabled (PASSED)
9. No auto-sync when auto_sync_enabled=false (PASSED)
10. Manual sync still works (no regression) (PASSED)
11. Health endpoint working (PASSED)
12. Login working (PASSED)
13. Calendar connections endpoint working (PASSED)
14. UI: Integrations page - Auto-sync section visible when provider connected (PASSED)
15. UI: Integrations page - Google Calendar + Outlook Calendar buttons for provider selection (PASSED)
16. UI: Integrations page - Active provider shows violet styling + Zap icon (PASSED)
17. UI: Integrations page - Désactiver button visible when auto-sync active (PASSED)
18. UI: Integrations page - Auto-sync section HIDDEN when no providers connected (PASSED)
19. UI: AppointmentDetail - Outlook Calendar with Zap icon for auto-synced appointment (PASSED)
20. UI: AppointmentDetail - Google Calendar manual sync button available (PASSED)
21. UI: AppointmentDetail - ICS download button visible (PASSED)
seed_data_creation: Auto-synced appointment 'Test Auto-Sync Outlook' (ID: f11d54c8-af9b-4df8-ad2e-cc831aa3ae25) verified with sync_source='auto' for Outlook
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-sync feature fully tested. User testuser_audit@nlyt.app has both Google (igaal.hanouna@gmail.com) and Outlook (igaal@hotmail.com) connected. Auto-sync is currently enabled for Outlook. Appointment f11d54c8-af9b-4df8-ad2e-cc831aa3ae25 shows Zap icon for Outlook (auto-synced). Manual sync creates sync_source='manual'. The perform_auto_sync function is called synchronously after appointment creation.

verified_features.auto_sync_settings_api: GET and PUT endpoints working with proper validation
verified_features.sync_source_field: sync_source='auto' for auto-synced, 'manual' for manual sync
verified_features.idempotence: Auto-sync checks for existing sync before creating new one
verified_features.ui_integrations_page: Auto-sync section with provider selector, violet active styling, Zap icon
verified_features.ui_appointment_detail: Zap icon for auto-synced, Check icon for manual sync
verified_features.no_regression: Manual sync, connect/disconnect Google and Outlook all working

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked. Real Outlook calendar events are created via Microsoft Graph API.
